description: Composition Purple round neck top made of 100% cotton, has set-in full arm sleeves with buttoned flaps, deeply curved hemline and graphic print on the front Fitting Comfort Wash care only hand wash in cold water using a mild detergent Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach, wring or tumble dry Flat dry in shade Mild iron, and do not iron on print/embellishment/embroidery Vacation in style in this purple top from wrangler. The set-in sleeves with buttoned flaps and the round neck exude with feminine style, while the graphic print on the front oozes happy spirit. Team this with jeans and heeled sandals for unparalleled cool. Model statistics The model wears size M in tops Height-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26”
